song.title: Give Thanks
song.lyrics:
[V1] . F Am7 Give thanks with a grateful heart. . Dm7 Am Give thanks to the Holy One. . A# F/A Give thanks because He's given . D# Csus C Jesus Christ, His Son.
(repeat)
[V2] . Am Dm7 Gm And now let the weak say, "I am strong." . C7 Fmaj7 Let the poor say, "I am rich, . Dm D# C7 Because of what the Lord has done for us."
(repeat)
[V3] . G Give thanks.
